rationale: Educ. Code §37.310 governs funding for juvenile justice alternative education programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A juvenile justice alternative education program is entitled to funding for a student who is placed in the program under this subchapter in the same manner as a juvenile justice alternative education program is entitled to funding under Section 37.012 for a student who is expelled and placed in a juvenile justice alternative education program for conduct for which expulsion is permitted but not required under Section 37.007.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns juvenile justice education funding and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
